USB C to jack 3.5

If you preorder this at launch, you will get a free acrylic of this character.

I use that as a pfp.

to figure out what their eureka gen is
and what they do with it
Eureka is a special resources and if conditions are met, Eureka is depleted to activate special skills/effects
the absolute easiest eureka unit i know of to understand is e7
she simply gains eureka whenever teammates use followup attacks
which include reactive heals from healers like medicine pocket
and then once her eureka hits 7, she casts an aoe
idk how other eureka units work i havent read their kits <:fishinge:1209958727390724127>
